items.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH): Reassessing Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
items.description: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) has quietly clawed back some recent losses, with the stock up around 5% over the past 3 months even as its one year return remains sharply negative for long term holders. See our latest analysis for UnitedHealth Group. That rebound has come after a bruising stretch for UnitedHealth Group. The latest share price is $339.71, with a 90 day share price return of 9.45%. However, a much weaker one year total shareholder return of 43.18% suggests sentiment is still...

items.title: Why UnitedHealth Stock Popped on Wednesday
items.description: One pundit following the company envisions notable improvements in both UnitedHealth and Optum.

items.title: Up 37% Since August, Is It Safe to Buy UnitedHealth Group Stock Again?
items.description: The health insurance giant's stock got a big boost after Wall Street learned Berkshire Hathaway had invested in it.

items.title: Why UnitedHealth (UNH) Stock Is Up Today
items.description: Shares of health insurance company UnitedHealth (NYSE:UNH) jumped 4.5% in the afternoon session after a flurry of positive analyst actions and strategic company updates signaled confidence in the healthcare giant's direction. Multiple firms expressed optimism, with Wolfe Research lifting its price target to $375 from $330. Bernstein also boosted its target to $440, and RBC Capital raised its target to $408.
